notion.description: Notion: criar paginas, databases, atualizar conteudo. Publicar resumos MBE, digests, knowledge base.
notion.notes: OAuth via browser. Setup: claude mcp add --transport http notion https://mcp.notion.com/mcp
notion.pendencia: ASSINAR: Notion (free tier funciona, Plus para databases ilimitados)

gmail.description: Google Workspace: Gmail + Calendar + Drive. Ler emails medicos, newsletters, alertas.
gmail.notes: MCP oficial do Google (marco 2026). Inclui --sanitize para protecao. OAuth Google.

healthcare-mcp.description: Healthcare: PubMed, FDA drugs, ClinicalTrials, CID-10, medRxiv, NCBI Bookshelf, DICOM, calculadoras medicas

pubmed-mcp.description: PubMed avancado: busca, abstracts, artigos relacionados, analise de literatura biomedica

biomcp.description: BioMCP: PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, MyVariant.info. Queries biomedicas em linguagem natural.

context7.description: Documentacao atualizada em tempo real para qualquer lib/framework.

github.description: GitHub: issues, PRs, repos, code search

fetch.description: Busca e download de conteudo web

brave-search.description: Busca web via Brave (2000 req/mo free)

sqlite.description: Base de dados local para knowledge base
